节点.功能描述: Connect to a specified candidate hotspot by networkId, only the configuration which is added by ourself is allowed to be connected. This method connect to a configuration at a time. The app must be in the foreground. 2. Incorrect parameter types. 3.Parameter verification failed.

@throws {BusinessError} 401 - Invalid parameters. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

parameters.说明: Network ID which will be connected. The value of networkId cannot be less than 0.

error_codes.description: Invalid parameters. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

节点.功能描述: Connect to a specified candidate hotspot by networkId, and wait for user respond result. Only the configuration which is added by ourself is allowed to be connected. This method connect to a configuration at a time. The app must be in the foreground. If the operation fails, an error message is returned.
注释信息: @param { number } networkId - Network ID which will be connected. The value of networkId cannot be less than 0.
@returns { Promise<void> } - Returns the promise object that used to return the operation result.
@throws { BusinessError } 2501005 - The user does not respond.
@throws { BusinessError } 2501006 - The user refused the action.

parameters.说明: Network ID which will be connected. The value of networkId cannot be less than 0.

节点.return_description: - Returns the promise object that used to return the operation result.
